sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْخُضْرَاوَاتُ عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ وَمَعَادِنَ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Povrće sadrži mnogo vitamina i minerala.
sentences.translationEn: Vegetables contain many vitamins and minerals.

sentences.arabic: تُحَضِّرُ أُمِّي سَلَطَةً طَازَجَةً لِلْغَدَاءِ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Moja majka svaki dan priprema svježu salatu za ručak.
sentences.translationEn: My mother prepares a fresh salad for lunch every day.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الطَّعَامِ الصِّحِّيِّ يَحْمِي الْجِسْمَ مِنْ أَمْرَاضٍ عَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje zdrave hrane štiti tijelo od brojnih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Eating healthy food protects the body from numerous diseases.
